stories.headline: China Says Iran Crisis Shows Nations Must Speed Up Energy Shift
stories.summary: Oil and gas shortages triggered by the US war against Iran should be a lesson to countries to accelerate their energy transitions, according to China’s climate envoy.

stories.headline: PBOC Adviser Sees Potential Rate Cut

stories.headline: Horizons Middle East & Africa 6/24/2026

Live from Dubai, we bring you the latest global markets and analysis, plus news-making interviews, with a special focus on MEA. All that and more, as you head to the office in the Gulf, pause for lunch in Hong Kong, or start your day in London or Johannesburg.  (Source: Bloomberg)
